mapper.sql: f.id, f.name, f.area_mu, f.crop_type, f.crop_variety, f.crop_variety_groups_json, f.province, f.city, f.district, f.township, f.formatted_address, f.status, f.enabled, f.location_lat, f.location_lng, f.location_desc, f.cover_image_url, f.remark, f.sort_order, f.deleted, f.created_at, f.updated_at

when.test: query.sortBy == 'distance' and query.latitude != null and query.longitude != null

choose.when:
ORDER BY distance_meters
DESC ASC , f.sort_order ASC, f.updated_at DESC

ORDER BY f.area_mu
ASC DESC , f.sort_order ASC, f.updated_at DESC
choose.otherwise: ORDER BY f.sort_order ASC, f.updated_at DESC

mapper.select:
SELECT ,
CASE WHEN f.location_point IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE ST_Distance_Sphere( f.location_point, ST_GeomFromText(#{query.queryPointWkt}) ) END AS distance_meters
NULL AS distance_meters
FROM field f
LIMIT #{query.offset}, #{query.pageSize}
mapper.update: UPDATE field SET location_point = CASE WHEN location_lat IS NULL OR location_lng IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN location_lat < -90 OR location_lat > 90 THEN NULL WHEN location_lng < -180 OR location_lng > 180 THEN NULL ELSE POINT(location_lng, location_lat) END WHERE id = #{id}
